subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Us unto her who turned towards God on a day when the sweet-scented breeze of the All-Merciful wafted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا الی التی اقبلت الی الله فی یوم فیه فاحت نفحه الرحمن فی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
